home.title: Kiemo Galerija
home.intro:
Kiemo Galerija (Yard Gallery) is an open-air street art gallery in a historic courtyard in Kaunas, Lithuania. It was founded more than a decade ago by artist Vytenis Jakas, who set out to bring neighbors together and honor the lives of the area's former Jewish residents through art. The gallery turns the courtyard's walls into canvases for murals and installations, blending history, community, and creativity.

Every artwork tells a story — from portraits of former residents to symbolic pieces reflecting the shared heritage of this place. In this digital space you can explore the gallery and its history. Everyone is invited to discover its unfolding story.

To help keep this unique space alive and growing, please consider donating, so that art connecting the past with the present can keep being made.

history.title: History
history.intro:
On this page you'll find two books that tell the story of Kiemo Galerija — its projects, its artworks, and the neighbors who made this project possible.

Book 1 – The Beginning

Book 2 – The Courtyard's Set Design and "Rooms of Secrets"

galleries.title: Book 2 – The Courtyard's Set Design and "Rooms of Secrets"

visiting.title: Visiting Hours & Rules
visiting.body:
Kiemo Galerija is a private space!

Thirty-six apartments around our courtyard are home to people of all ages who value peace and quiet at home!

We ask visitors to respect the privacy and peace of the courtyard's residents!

Rules for visiting Kiemo Galerija

Kiemo Galerija is open to visitors every day from 9:00 to 19:00.

We ask visitors not to make noise — please speak quietly and keep emotions restrained (loud comments, laughter, shouting, etc. disturb the neighbors' peace).

Please do not enter the stairwells or residents' apartments — this is the neighbors' private space!

No littering in the courtyard!

Using the courtyard space for games, quizzes, orienteering competitions, weddings, or other organized group activities must be arranged in advance with Kiemo Galerija's curator, Vytenis Jakas (email: jakuvy@gmail.com or yardgallerylt@gmail.com).

We wish you a beautiful visit and a good mood!

gallery.title: Kiemo Galerija: Virtual Gallery
gallery.intro: Welcome to Kiemo Galerija's virtual gallery. Here you can find photos of all the artworks in the courtyard, as well as a few photos of the creative process and the artists. Try clicking on the artworks to learn more about them!

support.title: Support Kiemo Galerija
support.body: Kiemo Galerija is a community initiative sustained by volunteers and donors. Your support helps maintain the artworks and the courtyard space.
